purpose: Record PR-132 C-rank recheck for USA Equibase, USTA, and AQHA routes. This file is not a calendar input.

source_rechecks.result: Official Equibase entries route was checked, but the page fetch returned access blocked and no complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were captured.

checked_terms: Equibase 2026 racing dates June 2026 track calendar
source_rechecks.result: Search results did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table. Major-race snippets are insufficient.
Official USTA entries route was checked, but no complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were captured. Current entries are not a full-month C-rank calendar.

checked_terms: USTA 2026 race dates June harness tracks
source_rechecks.result: Search and route checks did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table for US harness racing.
Official AQHA racing route was checked, but no complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows were captured.

checked_terms: American Quarter Horse Association racing schedule 2026
source_rechecks.result: Search and route checks did not capture a complete official June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse month table for AQHA quarter horse racing.

promotion_status.reason: USA is not promoted to C-rank manual records because no captured official or accepted route currently provides complete June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows for Equibase Thoroughbred, USTA Harness, or AQHA Quarter Horse.

regeneration_method.current: Re-check official Equibase, USTA, and AQHA entry/calendar routes and search for annual/monthly race-date exports. Use current entries only as discovery hints, not full-month C-rank records.
regeneration_method.missing_for_promotion: No-login annual/monthly race-date files, official exports, state commission calendars, or accepted official feeds that expose June 2026 meeting_date + racecourse rows for each USA group.

next_update_steps: For Equibase, look for downloadable annual race-date files, official track calendars, or state commission date feeds that can be reconciled to Equibase/Thoroughbred coverage.
For USTA, look for monthly race-date exports rather than current entries.
For AQHA, look for official race-date calendar exports or official track-date lists for June 2026.
Consider splitting USA into smaller PRs by governing/source group if a complete C-rank route is found for only one group.
Do not infer dates from normal weekly race patterns, current entries, major-race snippets, or track marketing pages.
